hero.role: Computer Engineering & HCID Student passionate about user interfaces and modern digital experiences.

about.title: I create digital experiences that
about.description1: I am a developer and designer currently pursuing a Double Degree in Human-Computer Interaction and Design at EIT Digital (Politecnico di Milano and Aalto University).
about.description2: My strong background in Computer Engineering, combined with my passion for UI/UX, allows me to bridge the gap between technical implementation and user needs.
about.sectionApproachTitle: Where design, technology, and entrepreneurship meet.
about.description3: I believe the best digital experiences are built at the intersection of strong engineering and human-centered design, with a clear focus on usability.
about.description4: My minor in Innovation and Entrepreneurship, together with courses such as Strategy and Marketing, strengthened my orientation toward the entrepreneurial and startup world.
about.interestsSubtitle: Some photos I am attached to from my recent period
about.interestsBody: I am a big fan of music of all kinds, I play the clarinet, and I enjoy sports and traveling. Some of these images capture moments from my recent period that are especially meaningful to me.

projects.title: Featured
projects.subtitle: Explore my projects organized by category

ricerca.title: Research
ricerca.description: Research and development projects exploring new technologies and methodologies

projects.title: LLM Guardrails Research
projects.description: Research on safety guardrails for Large Language Models
projects.longDescription: In collaboration with professors Matteo Camilli and Giovanni Quattrocchi at Politecnico di Milano. The project explores the development and implementation of safety mechanisms to mitigate risks and promote responsible deployment of Artificial Intelligence, with an academic paper currently in progress.

projects.title: HoloLimb-CR
projects.description: Portable Cross-Reality (CR) system to support phantom limb pain therapy.
projects.longDescription: HoloLimb-CR is an innovative AR/VR rehabilitation platform for the non-pharmacological management of Phantom Limb Pain (PLP). Developed for Meta Quest 3, the architecture enables seamless transitions between virtual and augmented environments, offering structured therapeutic exercises and accurate anatomical tracking in an experience optimized for independent home use. The related research paper ('HoloLimb-CR: Advancing Phantom Limb Pain Therapy Through Cross-Reality') has been accepted at the ICIR 2026 international conference.

full-stack.title: Full-Stack Development
full-stack.description: Complete web applications with modern frontend and robust backend

projects.title: Artendity
projects.description: Interactive web application to discover your own "Art DNA"
projects.longDescription: Developed for the Design of WWW Services course. Artendity allows users to take a visual quiz to discover their artistic preferences, receiving personalized recommendations and navigating an interactive gallery.

projects.title: Yoga Website
projects.longDescription: Built for the Hypermedia Applications course, this website combines a full-stack architecture with interactive multimedia content, offering an optimized user experience with a focus on responsive design.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android

projects.title: Flutter Flame Memory Game
projects.description: Cross-platform memory card game powered by the Flame engine
projects.longDescription: A device-agnostic memory game developed in Flutter with responsive interfaces. It features persistent level progression using Hive and adopts a robust state management approach.

projects.title: Breakout Game
projects.description: Cross-platform Breakout clone built with Flutter and Flame
projects.longDescription: A modern take on the classic Breakout arcade game, developed using Flutter and the Flame engine. It features responsive design, collision detection, and smooth gameplay mechanics.

xr.title: XR Projects
xr.description: Virtual, augmented, and mixed reality projects

projects.title: Hololimb
projects.description: XR app for rehabilitation through visual illusion
projects.longDescription: In collaboration with i3lab (Polimi), Hololimb is a Meta Quest 3 app aimed at reducing Phantom Limb Pain (PLP) by simulating a virtual limb to support patient rehabilitation therapy.

projects.title: CodingVirtualWorlds
projects.description: Programming and simulation of interactive worlds in VR
projects.longDescription: Project for the Coding Virtual Worlds course: design and implementation of multiple interactive VR environments for Meta Quest 3, culminating in the development of a networked multiplayer game.

consultancy.title: Consultancy
consultancy.description: Strategic consulting and technology implementation projects

projects.title: HR Consulting - SACE S.p.A.
projects.description: Strategic and technical recommendations to enhance HR digital tools
projects.longDescription: Consulting project for SACE S.p.A. developed during the Digital Business Innovation Lab course. The goal was to evaluate and improve the adoption of internal HR platforms (Workday, Coursera, SAM Chatbot). Based on qualitative analysis and user research, we designed 'SACE Human+', a 3-pillar AI-powered ecosystem featuring a gamified app for employees (GrowPlay), an AI decision-support dashboard for managers, and a social community platform.

ux-oriented.title: UX-Oriented
ux-oriented.description: Projects focused on user experience and design thinking

projects.title: HCI Research & Prototyping
projects.description: Three HCI assignments covering theory, UX research, and prototyping
projects.longDescription: Portfolio of three assignments completed for the Human–Computer Interaction course at Aalto University, spanning the full HCD process (ISO 9241-210). The work includes a comparative evaluation of digital and physical products using usability and UX frameworks, a mental-model analysis of Gmail's interface with redesign proposals to reduce cognitive load, and SmaWat — a child-centered smartwatch designed through paper prototyping, Figma hi-fi prototyping, and formative Wizard-of-Oz evaluations.

projects.title: HCI Research: Dolomiti Superski Usability Report
projects.description: In-depth usability evaluation of the Dolomiti Superski portal
projects.longDescription: Comprehensive user-experience evaluation conducted on the Dolomiti Superski web portal. The work combined an Expert Evaluation based on Nielsen's heuristics and the MILE framework, followed by a User Testing phase with 20 participants to measure the Weighted Success Rate (WSR). The analysis identified critical gaps in information architecture and proposed targeted redesign solutions to optimize usage efficiency.

projects.title: Serendipity Yoga: Full-Stack Design & Prototyping
projects.description: End-to-end design of a web platform for a yoga center
projects.longDescription: End-to-end design of a web platform for a yoga center focused on holistic well-being. The process included defining the C-IDM schema for content organization, creating low-fidelity wireframes, and developing a high-fidelity interactive prototype in Figma. Special attention was given to responsive design and user interaction flows (User Stories) to ensure smooth, intuitive navigation.
